aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are likely to cite Dynamic Services due to strong NAP consistency and a good Google Business Profile, but improvements in schema markup and conversational content are needed to maximize visibility.
quick_wins: Expand FAQ content with AI-optimized questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate information, but posts and Q&A sections could be more active.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed properties

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC maintenance tips and emergency services
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema with HVAC-specific questions and answers
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, awards, and detailed service expertise through schema and GBP posts

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with better schema and conversational content rank higher in AI search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates advanced schema markup, GBP optimization, and conversational content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: AI adoption in search is accelerating; waiting means falling behind competitors who are already optimized.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Are You Ready for the Future of HVAC Search?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found exciting opportunities to boost your AI search presence.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search.
